column1: # Well Tagged PDF (WTPDF) / PDF/UA-2 example documents by the LaTeX Project.
# All files are PDF 2.0, generated with LuaLaTeX, and conform (per the authors)
# to PDF/UA-2, PDF/A-4/4F, WTPDF Accessibility + Reuse, and Arlington.
# Licences vary (CC-BY for the arXiv papers, public domain for the historical
# texts); see the discussion. Hosted on Google Drive; downloaded via download.sh.
